CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of The Minor, Galin Hart
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor, Galin Hart.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Jubin J. Sharifi, Esq. appeared with petitioner Gayle Hart, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Galin Hart, who was also present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Ms. Hart Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on June 27, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $16,500.00.00.
Attorney Fees - $4,125.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $6,536.86.
Costs - 260.45.

The net balance of $5,577.69 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America - San Francisco Branch, located at 50 California Street, San Francisco, CA 94111. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to January 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of The Minor, Galin Hart
